name: NKG2D-CAR T cells cleared senescent cells in aged mice and primates
summary: NKG2D-CAR T cells provide an independent engineered immune-clearance animal and nonhuman-primate signal.
statement: NKG2D-CAR T cells selectively diminished senescent cells in vitro, alleviated multiple aging-associated pathologies and improved physical performance in irradiated and aged mice, and deleted naturally occurring senescent cells in aged nonhuman primates without observed adverse effects.
population_or_model: Senescent human cell systems, irradiated and aged mice, and aged nonhuman primates
quantitative_note: The source reports aged-mouse physical-performance improvement and senescent-cell deletion in aged nonhuman primates, but no treated-human efficacy data.
caveats: Nonhuman-primate target engagement is not equivalent to human aging efficacy.
NKG2D ligands can appear in stressed non-senescent contexts, creating target-specificity questions.
Cell therapy safety and manufacturing hurdles remain unresolved for preventive aging use.
